idea-plugin.name: Agent Workbench
idea-plugin.description:
Run and manage AI coding agents — Codex, Claude, and more — directly inside your IDE.
  • Quick Launch — press Cmd+\ / Ctrl+\ from anywhere to start a new task or continue an existing one. Your current selection, file, and symbol are attached automatically.
  • AI Review — press Alt+Ctrl+\ / Opt+Cmd+\ to review local changes or commits with AI and catch bugs, security issues, and style problems before they reach the main branch.
  • All Sessions in One Place — browse, reopen, and resume AI sessions across providers, grouped by project.
  • Persistent Chat Tabs — each session opens in its own editor tab and survives IDE restarts.
  • Separate Window Mode — run AI chat in a dedicated frame so you can work on code and manage tasks side by side.
  • Automatic Context — editor selections, VCS changes, project-view selections, and test results are collected and sent with your prompt so the agent has the context it needs.
  • Context from UI — click any IDE component (tool window, editor, panel) to screenshot it and attach the image as visual context for the agent.
  • Context from Screen — drag to select any screen area and capture it as a screenshot to share with the agent, even outside the IDE.
Experimental — features are under active development and may change without notice.

registryKey.description: Collapse large Codex TUI patch transcripts in Agent Workbench chat tabs
